meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Context.dev
products.tagline: One API to scrape, enrich, and extract the internet
products.summaryZh: 一个API，即可抓取、丰富和提取互联网信息
products.descriptionZh: Context.dev 是面向AI产品与智能体的网页上下文API。通过单一API即可实现：抓取任意URL、爬取网站、将页面转换为适配LLM的Markdown格式、按自定义模式提取结构化数据、捕获截图、获取Logo/配色/字体/样式指南/公司数据及交易信息增强。获YC孵化支持，无需绑定银行卡，开发者或编码智能体可在数分钟内完成集成。
products.description: Context.dev is the web context API for AI products and agents. Scrape any URL, crawl sites, turn pages into LLM-ready Markdown, extract structured data into your own schema, capture screenshots, and retrieve logos, colors, fonts, styleguides, company data, and transaction enrichment through one API. YC-backed, no card required, and built so developers or coding agents can integrate in minutes.

products.name: Needle
products.tagline: The proactive GTM agent in Slack and Teams
products.summaryZh: Slack和Teams中的主动式GTM智能体
products.descriptionZh: 大多数销售AI都在等你提问。Needle则主动出击。它就像你团队中的GTM工程师：关注你的销售管道，在你行动之前就采取行动。它能发现停滞的交易并起草跟进方案，在通话前为你做好准备，保持CRM整洁，呈现真实的购买信号。它存在于Slack和Teams中，与HubSpot、Gmail和Gong相连。与通用型代理不同，它专为营收团队打造，通过你的权限运作，你的上下文和记忆保持可移植。无锁定。不是另一个仪表盘。
products.description: Most sales AI waits for you to ask. Needle is proactive. It works like a GTM engineer on your team: it watches your pipeline and acts before you do. Spots stalled deals and drafts the follow-up, preps you before calls, keeps your CRM tidy, surfaces real buying signals. It lives in Slack and Teams, wired into HubSpot, Gmail and Gong. Unlike horizontal agents, it is built for revenue teams, acts through your permissions, and your context and memory stay portable. No lock-in. Not another dashboard.

products.name: PixFit
products.tagline: Turn 1 creative into every ad format, instantly
products.summaryZh: 一键将1个创意转化为所有广告格式
products.descriptionZh: 资深设计师不应手动调整即将上线的素材尺寸，或费心记忆TikTok安全区域。PixFit将1个主视觉转化为所有广告格式——品牌完美适配、平台专属定制、即用即发。
products.description: Senior Designers shouldn't be manually-resizing assets ready to run or being aware of TikTok safe zones. PixFit turns 1 key visual into every ad format — brand-perfect, platform-specific, ready to ship.

products.name: Macro
products.tagline: Unifies your work into one app with shared memory
products.summaryZh: 将你的工作统一到一个具有共享记忆的应用中。
products.descriptionZh: Macro 是一个集邮件、消息、文档、任务、代码、智能体、通话和CRM于一体的全能工作空间。借助团队级记忆功能，你可以查询整个工作空间，永不丢失上下文。
products.description: Macro is the all-in-one workspace that combines email, messages, docs, tasks, code, agents, calls, and CRM. With team-level memory, you can query your entire workspace and never lose context.

products.name: Solaris
products.tagline: Your company’s AI adoption and upskilling platform
products.summaryZh: 贵公司的AI应用与技能提升平台
products.descriptionZh: Solaris是一个AI原生转型平台，帮助组织在各团队中建立AI应用能力。从能力测试开始，了解团队当前水平，再为每个团队提供定制化学习、实用案例、工作流挑战、内部推广大使及采纳追踪。Solaris帮助企业从零散的AI实验转向可衡量的能力建设，让AI真正融入日常工作方式。
products.description: Solaris is an AI-native transformation platform that helps organisations build AI fluency across every team. Start with a fluency test to understand where people are today, then give each team tailored learning, practical use cases, workflow challenges, champions and adoption tracking. Solaris helps companies move from scattered AI experiments to measurable capability, so AI becomes part of how work actually gets done.

products.name: Banger Mail
products.tagline: Shared mailboxes for teams and AI agents
products.summaryZh: 团队和AI代理的共享邮箱
products.descriptionZh: Banger 是一款原生 Mac 应用，专为使用 support@、sales@、founder@ 等共享收件箱的团队设计。你和 AI 代理在同一邮箱中协作：代理负责分类、标记和起草邮件（具备范围限定的访问权限），而你则可在发送前进行审核。可连接自有域名或 Google Workspace 账户，搜索所有内容，分配邮件线程，并在看板上追踪工作进度。早期访问：14 天免费，2 个邮箱，100 个 AI 积分，无需绑定银行卡。目前开放 500 个名额。先推出 Mac 版本，Windows 和移动端后续上线。
products.description: Banger is a native Mac app for teams running shared inboxes like support@, sales@, and founder@. You and AI agents work the same mailboxes: agents triage, label, and draft with scoped access, while you review before anything sends. Connect your own domain or Google Workspace accounts, search everything, assign threads, and track work on a board. Early access: 14 days free, 2 mailboxes, 100 AI credits, no card. 500 spots now. Mac first, Windows and mobile next.

products.name: PieterPost MCP
products.tagline: Connect your AI agent to postal mail
products.summaryZh: 将你的AI智能体连接到邮政信件
products.descriptionZh: PieterPost MCP 将 AI 代理与邮政信件连接起来。通过 ChatGPT、Claude、Codex、Claude Code 或任何 MCP 客户端，代理可以准备信件和明信片、使用 Mailbook 联系人、上传附件或明信片图片、创建结账链接以及跟踪订单。它将 PieterPost 在线邮件、API 和支付链接工作流整合到代理工具中。
products.description: PieterPost MCP connects AI agents to postal mail. From ChatGPT, Claude, Codex, Claude Code, or any MCP client, agents can prepare letters and postcards, use Mailbook contacts, upload attachments or postcard images, create checkout links, and track orders. It brings PieterPost online mail, API, and payment-link workflows into agent tools.

products.name: scritty
products.tagline: Shared, searchable memory for every AI coding agent
products.summaryZh: 每个AI编码代理的共享、可搜索记忆
products.descriptionZh: Scritty 是一款终端模拟器，可捕获每个 CLI 代理（Claude、Codex、Copilot、Antigravity、Ollama）的对话内容，将其索引为可由你控制的、可搜索的语料库，并通过 MCP 将内容回传给代理，通过 CLI 回传给你。一个会话可跨桌面端、浏览器和移动端使用。捕获内容保留在你的设备上。
products.description: scritty is a terminal emulator that captures every CLI agent's conversation (Claude, Codex, Copilot, Antigravity, Ollama), indexes it into one searchable corpus you control, and serves it back to your agents over MCP and to you over the CLI. One session across desktop, browser, and mobile. Your captures stay on your machine.

products.name: Sidedoor
products.tagline: Paste any job, find who in your network can refer you
products.summaryZh: 粘贴任意职位，查找人脉中谁可以为你推荐
products.descriptionZh: Sidedoor 会搜索你的 Gmail、LinkedIn、Instagram、Twitter、Outlook 以及好友关系，帮你找到谁能为你推荐任何工作。大多数人都会对出现的人选感到意外。完全免费。
products.description: Sidedoor searches your Gmail, LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter, Outlook, and friends' connections to find who can refer you to any job. Most people are surprised by who shows up. 100% free.

products.name: Macuse
products.tagline: Give Your AI Superpowers on macOS
products.summaryZh: 在 macOS 上为你的 AI 赋予超能力
products.descriptionZh: Macuse 是一款原生 macOS 应用，可将 Claude、Codex、Cursor、Raycast 及任何兼容 MCP 的 AI 客户端连接至你的 Mac 应用。它让 AI 助手能够本地访问日历、邮件、备忘录、提醒事项、信息，并通过 Computer Use 实现真实的应用程序控制。
products.description: Macuse is a native macOS app that connects Claude, Codex, Cursor, Raycast, and any MCP-compatible AI client to your Mac apps. It gives AI assistants local access to Calendar, Mail, Notes, Reminders, Messages, and real app control through Computer Use.

products.name: html.contact
products.tagline: A full form backend you can test before paying
products.summaryZh: 一个完整形态的后端，可在付费前进行测试
products.descriptionZh: html.contact 将纯 HTML 表单转化为可用的邮件表单，支持附件、日志、导出、API 访问、验证路由、域名白名单和垃圾邮件控制。免费版的设计让你可以在升级前测试真实配置，而不仅仅是体验少数功能。
products.description: html.contact turns plain HTML forms into working email forms with attachments, logs, exports, API access, verified routing, domain allowlists, and spam controls. The Free plan is built so you can test the real setup before upgrading, not just sample a few features.

products.name: Basedash Actions
products.tagline: A BI tool that can take action for you
products.summaryZh: 一款能为你执行操作的BI工具
products.descriptionZh: Basedash 能回答关于数据的问题。现在，它还能对数据执行操作。让智能体延长试用期、修正记录或填充演示组织——它会编写 SQL 语句，并在管理员允许编辑的任何数据库上执行。让它更新 Stripe 订阅或创建 HubSpot 线索，它会通过你已连接的任何 MCP 工具执行操作。每个重要操作都会暂停等待你的批准，每个工具都有独立的权限。技能将这一切串联成工作流。从答案到行动。
products.description: Basedash answers questions about your data. Now it acts on them. Ask the agent to extend a trial, fix a record, or seed a demo org — it writes the SQL and runs it against any database an admin has enabled for edits. Ask it to update a Stripe subscription or create a HubSpot lead and it acts through any MCP tool you've connected. Every consequential action pauses for your approval, and every tool has its own permission. Skills chain it all into workflows. From answers to actions.

products.name: Flowly
products.tagline: A personal AI agent that runs on your desktop and iPhone
products.summaryZh: 一款运行于桌面端和iPhone的个人AI代理
products.descriptionZh: Flowly 的完整智能体核心现已开源（Apache-2.0）。这是一款可在桌面和 iPhone 上运行的个人 AI 智能体，使用你已有的 AI 密钥，并保存你世界的私密记忆，能够自我学习和修正。它了解你的世界，只听从于你。
products.description: Flowly's whole agent core is now open source (Apache-2.0). A personal AI agent that runs on your desktop and iPhone, uses the AI keys you already have, and keeps a private memory of your world that learns and corrects itself. Knows your world. Answers to you.

products.name: Gaming Chat SDK by CometChat
products.tagline: Chat drops into Unreal like it was always there
products.summaryZh: Chat 无缝融入 Unreal，仿佛本就存在其中。
products.descriptionZh: 专注于游戏开发，聊天功能交给我们。CometChat的Unreal SDK让玩家在游戏内实时交流，支持一对一和群组消息、在线状态、内容审核，以及40多个实时代理（涵盖消息、输入状态和反应）。完全支持蓝图和C++，可适配可视化图表或代码库。附带聊天面板和HUD切换按钮，也可基于CometChat子系统构建自定义UI。目前处于测试阶段，支持Windows、macOS、iOS和Android平台。
products.description: Focus on building the game. We'll handle the chat. CometChat's Unreal SDK lets players talk to each other right inside the game, mid-match: 1:1 and group messaging, presence, moderation, and 40+ real-time delegates for messages, typing, and reactions. Full Blueprint and C++ support, so it fits your visual graph or your codebase. Ships with a chat panel and toggle button for your HUD, or build your own UI on CometChat's subsystem. Currently in beta, for Windows, macOS, iOS, and Android.

products.name: Retrace
products.tagline: Debug AI agents by replaying and forking runs
products.summaryZh: 通过回放和分支运行来调试AI智能体
products.descriptionZh: 记录、回放、分支与共享AI代理执行过程。查看代理的每一次LLM调用、工具调用及错误，数秒内完成调试与迭代。每月1000次追踪免费使用。
products.description: Record, replay, fork & share AI agent executions. See every LLM call, tool invocation, and error your agent makes, then debug and iterate in seconds. Free for 1,000 traces/mo.

products.name: Quick Sub 2: Video Subtitling
products.tagline: Quick, creative video subtitling with direct canvas control.
products.summaryZh: 快速、创意的视频字幕制作，支持画布直接控制。
products.descriptionZh: Quick Sub 2 是一款基于 SwiftUI 从头构建的轻量级 macOS 应用，专为创意视频字幕制作而设计。可独立控制文本样式、容器几何形状和旋转角度。直接在视频画布上拖拽字幕对象以实现精准定位，通过单条命令即可为多个对象批量应用样式，并支持从 0.1 倍到 10 倍缩放动态时间轴以实现精确时间控制。该应用具备完整的原生撤销/重做堆栈及 qsub2 文件持久化功能。
products.description: Quick Sub 2 is a streamlined macOS application built from the ground up in SwiftUI for creative video subtitling. Get independent control over text styling, container geometry, and rotation angles. Drag subtitle objects directly on the video canvas for perfect positioning, apply batch styles across multiple objects with a single command, and use a dynamic timeline that scales from 0.1x to 10x for precision timing. The application has full native Undo/Redo stacks andqsub2 file persistence.

products.name: EasyAR Mega
products.tagline: Turn entire cities into your AR canvas.
products.summaryZh: 将整座城市变成你的AR画布。
products.descriptionZh: EasyAR Mega 是一款大规模视觉定位系统（VPS），支持开发者通过灵活的数据采集方式（手机、全景相机或扫描仪）及多终端部署，为城市、商场和景区构建持久且厘米级精度的增强现实体验。
products.description: EasyAR Mega is a large-scale Visual Positioning System (VPS) that empowers developers to build persistent, centimeter-accurate AR experiences for cities, malls, and scenic spots with flexible data acquisition (phones, panoramic cameras, or scanners) and multi-terminal deployment.

products.name: adsideō
products.tagline: Ambient AI layer that works before you ask
products.summaryZh: 在你开口之前就已工作的环境AI层
products.descriptionZh: Adsideo 能理解你在屏幕、会议、写作、记忆和代码中的实时上下文。它无需等待提示，而是静默地将这些上下文转化为实用操作，例如创建任务、回答问题、起草内容和修复问题。与聊天机器人不同，Adsideo 在日常计算的幕后运行，让 AI 显得自然、无缝且易于使用，即使对于不主动使用 AI 工具的人来说也是如此。
products.description: Adsideo understands your live context across your screen, meetings, writing, memory, and code. Instead of waiting for prompts, it quietly turns that context into useful actions like creating tasks, answering questions, drafting content, and fixing problems. Unlike chatbots, Adsideo works in the background of everyday computing, making AI feel natural, seamless, and accessible even for people who don’t actively use AI tools.

products.name: ZCode
products.tagline: The official harness for GLM-5.2
products.summaryZh: GLM-5.2 官方背带
products.descriptionZh: ZCode 是 GLM-5.2 的官方智能体开发环境，专为长时间运行的编码任务而构建，具备稳定的上下文、文件编辑、终端与浏览器状态、Git 审查、移动端远程访问、机器人控制、BYOK 功能，并提供 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 应用。
products.description: ZCode is the official agentic development environment for GLM-5.2, built for long-running coding tasks with stable context, file edits, terminal and browser state, Git review, mobile Remote, bot control, BYOK, and macOS, Windows, and Linux apps.

products.name: Fypro
products.tagline: Convert your TikTok followers into paying customers
products.summaryZh: 将TikTok粉丝转化为付费客户
products.descriptionZh: 你已在TikTok上积累了一批信任你的粉丝。Fypro将这些粉丝转化为真正属于你的付费客户。输入你的账号名称，它会读取你的账户信息，然后为你构建整套体系：基于你的内容搭建网站、根据你的领域匹配商品上架店铺、用你的声音生成视频，以及完全归你所有的客户与邮件列表。该系统基于400万条以上TikTok爆款视频训练而成，已有2000多位创作者使用。
products.description: You built a TikTok following that trusts you. Fypro turns those followers into paying customers you actually own. Drop your handle and it reads your account, then builds the whole thing for you: a site from your content, a store stocked with products matched to your niche, videos in your own voice, and a customer and email list that's yours to keep. Trained on 4M+ viral TikToks. Used by 2,000+ creators.
